alternate_names: Council of Registered Ethical Security Testers
notes: International accreditation body for cybersecurity service providers. Operates examination and certification schemes including CHECK (UK National Cyber Security Centre approved pentest scheme) and STAR (Simulated Targeted Attack and Response). Members-only standards and methodologies.

match_nodes.description: CREST CHECK — UK NCSC-approved penetration testing

data.notes: Members-only methodology. CHECK is the UK NCSC-approved scheme for penetration testing of HMG and CNI systems.

match_nodes.description: CREST STAR — Simulated Targeted Attack and Response

data.official_name: CREST STAR - Simulated Targeted Attack and Response
data.notes: Members-only. Red-team / threat-led penetration testing methodology used in UK financial-sector CBEST and EU TIBER-EU programmes.
